emails.subject: Long Term Sales to Utilities
emails.body: Long Term Sales to Utilities Jeff: Following up on your request of last week, my records on offers made but not closed is pretty weak. All three utilities held numerous RFPs over the late summer autum. We participated in all of them. We ended up closing only 2 transactrions as a reuslt of the RFP process and a 3rd was closed with SCE throught the broker market. I do not keep offers made and not acceptable. There were quite a few of them. SDG&E had the most RFPs, probably 4 -5 and we sent in prices for all of them. SCE was in second with 3 or so and we were successful in 1. SCE had several too and we were not successful, but the next day were matched up with them through the broker market at a lower price than we showed them in the RFP as the price had moved down. Call me to discuss when you get in. C 503/464-3822 PG&E 1) 50 MW $58.70/MWh Peak 2001 -2005 2) 50 MW $58.40/MWh Peak 2001 -2005 SCE: 1) 50 MW $60.00?Mwh Peak 2001 2005 SDG&E No Longer Dated Activity CDWR I think you are aware of the business here.
